title: Notifications -  Update Available OFF
scenario: No device software update notification appears when notification setting is OFF and app is in background after pairing a device with outdated firmware
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Locate the 'Device Software Update' toggle and set it to OFF.
4. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
5. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is powered off and not currently connected.
6. On the server/cloud, confirm there is a newer firmware version available than what is currently on the device.
7. Power on the Poly device and initiate pairing (e.g., press and hold the Bluetooth button).
8. Complete the pairing process so the device connects to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Observe whether any 'Device Software Update' notification appears on the mobile device.
expected: No 'Device Software Update' notification appears on the mobile device after pairing, because the notification is turned OFF in app settings.
